intended_use: The system is intended to be used for head, whole body Computed Tomography applications.
intended_use_full: The system is intended to be used for head, whole body Computed Tomography applications.
ground_truth: IEC 61223-3-5 Ed. 2.0 standard image quality metrics and QA phantoms; comparison to predicate device (K203169)
other_metrics: Image quality (IQ) performance testing in accordance with IEC 61223-3-5 Ed. 2; comparable IQ performance demonstrated between Merc40H and Merc40L detectors using standard IQ and QA phantoms
